summary: Audience tape with noticeable hiss but captures a solid Tulsa show highlighted by a nice Peggy‑O performance.
review: The recording is an audience (AUD) capture – the mayor of Tulsa’s mic picked up some hiss and makes Donna’s vocals hard to hear, yet fans appreciate the raw crowd ambience. Musically the band delivers a pretty solid set, with reviewers especially calling out a enjoyable rendition of Peggy‑O. Overall the show shines despite the lo‑fi tape quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews consistently praise the performance while noting hiss and heavy audience noise; weighted average of strong show (≈4) and fair recording (≈3) yields ~4 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Noticeable tape hiss, Donna's vocals often buried, heavy layer of audience chatter; not a clean soundboard but captures the live atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid, upbeat set with strong crowd interaction; the heavy audience presence adds to the vibe rather than detracting from the music.
